passwordChange.title: Change Master Password
passwordChange.tooShort: New password must be at least 10 characters
passwordChange.decryptPrivateFailed: Could not decrypt current private key - try logging in again
passwordChange.decryptIdentityFailed: Could not decrypt current identity key - try logging in again

totp.invalidCode: Invalid code - check your authenticator app
totp.enableIntro: Add an extra layer of security. You'll need an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy.
totp.scanIntro: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the secret key manually.

stepUp.title: Confirm Identity
stepUp.requiresMasterPassword: This action requires your master password.

recoveryDownload.hint: Printable HTML file with your recovery key and QR code. Store in a safe place offline.
